heading: Allow Single Sign-On for Your Users
section: Allow Single Sign-On for Your Users
text:
# Allow Single Sign-On for Your Users

Let users sign on to your service with their Mobile number, Username, Password/PIN, and two-factor authentication. This will allow users to access all services with a single login.
content:
# Allow Single Sign-On for Your Users

Let users sign on to your service with their Mobile number, Username, Password/PIN, and two-factor authentication. This will allow users to access all services with a single login.
